channel.title: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.description: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.
channel.itunes:author: Miguel's Morning Bytes
channel.itunes:summary: A daily executive briefing on the news shaping AI, enterprise software, and the future of work. Each morning, Miguel's Morning Bytes walks through the top stories from across the press — frontier model launches, competitor moves, Salesforce and Agentforce headlines, hiring and labor shifts — through the lens of what a Chief Revenue Officer needs to know.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
item.description: Today's brief leads with French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm. Also covered: Chipmaker Nvidia Seeks to Raise Over $25bn in First Bond Deal Since 2021; Europe's AI Champion Mistral Vulnerable to Russian Disinformation, Study Finds; How the AI Boom Turned a Buyout Deal Into One of History's Most Lucrative; Microsoft's Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI; IBM's $17 Million DOJ Settlement Makes the Case for Civility.

item.title: June 16, 2026 — French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm
item.description: Today's brief leads with French Security Service to Replace Palantir With Local Firm. Also covered: Chipmaker Nvidia Seeks to Raise Over $25bn in First Bond Deal Since 2021; Europe's AI Champion Mistral Vulnerable to Russian Disinformation, Study Finds; How the AI Boom Turned a Buyout Deal Into One of History's Most Lucrative; Microsoft's Latest Surface PCs Offer Better Graphics, Faster AI; IBM's $17 Million DOJ Settlement Makes the Case for Civility.
